---
title: cognitive-complexity
description: "Limit nested control-flow complexity."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** 🟡 `warning`

Limit nested control-flow complexity. Strider default: maximum 7.

## Bad

```go
if ready {
	for _, item := range items {
		if valid(item) { process(item) }
	}
}
```

## Good

```go
if !ready { return }
process()
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only cognitive-complexity`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
